0111100111110110010100000011100011000101101 - ASI: 21

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  001 = 0 * 01
  010 = 01 * 0
  011 = 0 * 11
  1011 = 1 * 011
  01111 = 011 * 11
  11000 = 11 * 000
  000001 = 000 * 001
  001010 = 001 * 010
  001111 = 0 * 01111
  101101 = 1011 * 01
  1011001010 = 1011 * 001010
  00000111000 = 000001 * 11000
  01111001111 = 01111 * 001111
  11000101101 = 11000 * 101101
  011110011111011001010 = 01111001111 * 1011001010
  0000011100011000101101 = 00000111000 * 11000101101
  0111100111110110010100000011100011000101101 = 011110011111011001010 * 0000011100011000101101
